task_completion.description: Open and read the OSHA inspection report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'osha_inspection_report.txt' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Create the 'OSHA Violation - Minor' Disciplinary Incident/Action Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS UI showing the creation form or a list view containing the newly added 'OSHA Violation - Minor' incident/action type.

task_completion.description: Create the 'OSHA Violation - Critical' Disciplinary Incident/Action Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS UI showing the creation form or a list view containing the newly added 'OSHA Violation - Critical' incident/action type.

task_completion.description: Log the minor incident against Christopher Lee
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo Disciplinary module showing an incident record for Christopher Lee (EMP014) using the 'OSHA Violation - Minor' type, with the description mentioning 'high-visibility vest'.

task_completion.description: Log the critical incident against Andrew Thomas
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo Disciplinary module showing an incident record for Andrew Thomas (EMP017) using the 'OSHA Violation - Critical' type, with the description mentioning 'lockout/tagout'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Sentrifugo via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Firefox/Chrome) navigating the Sentrifugo HRMS interface, rather than terminal commands executing database queries or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the Sentrifugo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting the descriptions into the actual Sentrifugo web forms, not just echoing text in a terminal or editing a local script.

integrity.description: The agent retrieved the incident descriptions from the provided text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen opening the specific 'osha_inspection_report.txt' file on the Desktop to get the descriptions, rather than hallucinating them or pulling them from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The incident report is located at /home/ga/Desktop/osha_inspection_report.txt. The required Disciplinary Incident/Action Types to be created are exactly 'OSHA Violation - Minor' and 'OSHA Violation - Critical'. The incident logged for Christopher Lee (EMP014) must include the keyword 'high-visibility vest' in the description. The incident logged for Andrew Thomas (EMP017) must include the keyword 'lockout/tagout' in the description.
